scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,etl "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix etl run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n frontend,backend,etl,infra "npm --prefix frontend run build" "npm --prefix backend run build" "npm --prefix etl run build" "npm --prefix infra run build"
scripts.test: concurrently -n backend,etl "npm --prefix backend run test" "npm --prefix etl run test"
scripts.local:db:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d postgres pgweb
scripts.local:start: npm run local:db && npm run dev
